title: anthurium oxyanthum
intro: Anthurium oxyanthum, also known as the veitchii or queen anthurium, is a species of flowering plant in the Arum family, native to the tropical rainforests of Ecuador. The medicinal properties of Anthurium oxyanthum include its potential to reduce inflammation and its antimicrobial properties, which may be beneficial in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to support cardiovascular health, improve respiratory function, and act as a natural antioxidant. An herbal preparation of Anthurium oxyanthum can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water, creating a tea that may be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
